final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster reimagining of 大话西游 (A Chinese Odyssey) in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style, featuring 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a passionate kiss against a city wall, with 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distant background.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong film poster, photorealistic with heavy film grain, inspired by Wong Kar-wai and Stephen Chow era visual language, analog photography aesthetic
Composition: medium shot centered on the kissing couple against a weathered stone city wall, background figures small and out of focus in the far distance, slight dutch tilt for dramatic tension
Subject: 至尊宝 in classic costume embracing 紫霞 in a passionate kiss against the city wall; 牛魔王 and 唐僧 as silhouetted figures standing apart in the hazy background
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese city wall at dusk or golden hour, crumbling stone texture, dusty atmospheric haze
Lighting/mood: warm amber and dusty golden backlight, long shadows, melancholic and romantic mood evoking bittersweet love
Color palette: faded warm amber and burnt orange as dominant tones, desaturated mid-tones with slight cyan shadow, aged color bleed typical of 90s Hong Kong film stock
Materials/textures: heavy analog film grain throughout, visible halation around light sources, slight color fringing, worn poster print texture
Avoid: digital clean rendering, modern CGI look, oversaturated colors, contemporary poster layout, watermark
